title: Struan Logan Chaotic Good
description: After several years out of performing, comedian and writer Struan Logan returns to the craft with new found sense of zest, bringing his unique blend of narrative driven stand-up with all the pieces falling into place. Last time Struan was in Brighton was on a whistle-stop tour as a globetrotting headliner and festival comic with his solo show being performed across three continents. As a writer Struan has sprung back in by working with Scottish paper The National, providing opinions that are political but focus on the personal over partizan. Chaotic Good does the same but you’ll have to see the whole hour to find out how. “A truly authentic comedian.” ★ ★ ★ ★ – Voice Mag “The time just flew.” ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ – Weekend Notes “Humble.” ★ ★ ★ ★ ½ – Adelaide Advertiser “Adorably goofy.” ★ ★ ★ ★ – The Music “Cringe.” ★ ★ – The List
content_warnings: If you are unsure of content or potentially triggered please feel frree to directly contact where themes can be discussed in more detail
